title: PropertyComparison
description: Compares one specific property (e.g. keywords, description) between the two datasets of a Dataset Relationship.

targetProperty.description: Which part of the datasets is compared (e.g. keywords, description)

similarityScore.description: Similarity value computed between the concerned datasets

usesMetrics.description: Metric used to compute the similarity score

relevantWords.description: Highlight of specific values (e.g. common keywords between datasets)
